overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player ascending and walking through a multi-level pedestrian overpass in a futuristic neon-lit city. The journey transitions from enclosed concrete stairwells to open-air walkways overlooking busy streets below, featuring cyberpunk aesthetics with teal and red neon lighting, vending machines, and scattered NPCs.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete stairwell with teal fluorescent lighting

events.description: reaching top of stairs and entering horizontal corridor

agents.ego_description: walking up concrete stairs in a covered pedestrian passageway with advertisements on walls

entered.detail: wide concrete stairs with debris scattered on steps
linear fluorescent tube lights emitting cyan colored illumination
advertising posters and notices attached to left wall
large illuminated digital billboard with text and graphics
scattered litter and paper trash on the ground

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with a first-person view ascending a concrete stairwell in a covered pedestrian walkway. Teal fluorescent lights illuminate the space while digital advertisements and posters line the walls. The environment is clean but shows signs of urban decay with scattered debris.

scene_state.functional_zone: transitional corridor with security checkpoint and burning barrel

events.description: entering darker section of corridor with dim ambient lighting
approaching security room with prominent red neon lighting
passing burning barrel with active fire and smoke

agents.ego_description: moving through dimly lit corridor past security room with red emergency lighting

notable_agents.action: person in dark clothing walking in opposite direction past the camera

entered.detail: wide concrete pedestrian corridor with smooth walls
enclosed room with glass windows and red interior lighting
crimson colored emergency or security lighting
metal drum with active fire burning inside

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a transitional corridor shifting from teal to dark to red lighting. A security room with crimson neon lights appears on the right, followed by a burning barrel. A pedestrian passes by in the opposite direction as the environment transitions from enclosed stairwell to open bridge area.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian bridge with vending machines and seating area

events.description: descending small set of stairs near vending machines
ascending stairs toward upper level of bridge

agents.ego_description: navigating through covered bridge past vending machines and a seated person on concrete bench

notable_agents.action: person in red top sitting on concrete bench facing the city view

entered.detail: bright purple automated vending unit with illuminated display
long concrete seating structure along the left wall
flight of stairs leading down then up to different bridge levels

segments.scene_description: Walking through a covered pedestrian bridge lined with vending machines including a distinctive purple unit. The camera passes a burning barrel and descends then ascends stairs, passing a person sitting on a concrete bench. The environment shows urban decay with scattered trash and graffiti.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated open-air pedestrian walkway overlooking busy street

events.description: emerging from covered bridge to open view of cyberpunk city street below
vehicles visible moving on multi-lane street below the overpass

agents.ego_description: ascending final stairs and walking along open-air section of pedestrian bridge with city view

entered.detail: transparent glass barrier along the edge of the overpass
wide view of cyberpunk city street with buildings and traffic
tall buildings illuminated with bright neon advertisements and signage
cars and vehicles moving on the street beneath the overpass

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends stairs and emerges onto an open-air section of the pedestrian bridge, revealing a stunning view of the cyberpunk city below. Glass railings line the edge as neon-lit skyscrapers tower in the distance and traffic moves along the street beneath. The transition from enclosed to open space provides a panoramic view of the urban landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy covered pedestrian overpass with multiple vending machines

events.description: crowd density increases with multiple pedestrians walking in both directions
navigating around concrete support columns and other pedestrians

agents.ego_description: walking through busy pedestrian bridge passing groups of people and multiple vending machines

notable_agents.action: group of three pedestrians walking ahead in the same direction
person in light colored jacket walking toward the camera

entered.detail: bright orange automated vending unit with illuminated product display
thick structural pillars supporting the overpass roof
visible lower pedestrian level through openings in the floor structure

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves through a covered section of the pedestrian bridge bustling with activity. Multiple vending machines line the walls while groups of pedestrians walk in opposing directions. The architecture features heavy concrete support columns and views down to lower walkway levels, maintaining the cyberpunk aesthetic with teal neon lighting and urban grit.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey ascending through a gritty urban overpass that transforms from an enclosed concrete stairwell into a panoramic open-air vista of a neon-lit metropolis. It begins by climbing a stairwell illuminated by teal fluorescent lights and digital advertisements, moving through a transitional corridor where the lighting shifts from teal to a deep crimson glow near a security room and a burning barrel. As the camera progresses across a covered bridge, it passes vending machines and graffiti-covered benches before ascending a final set of stairs. The scene then opens abruptly onto an exposed section of the bridge, where glass railings reveal a sprawling cityscape of towering skyscrapers and flowing traffic below. Finally, the camera moves back into a bustling covered area characterized by heavy concrete columns and crowds of pedestrians under a return to teal neon lighting.
